_comment: Focus-block configuration for the weekly generator (spec Section 3.4 / SKILL.md Section 4). Blocks are CONFIGURED here, not hardcoded in the generator: name, length, days/week, tier, and session templates. Two concurrent blocks (skill + strength don't interfere). PROTECT strength percentages feed the deterministic load calc — no weights are written here. Confirmed config: spec default — 6-wk ring-MU skill block (3x/wk) + front-squat/strict-press strength emphasis (2x/wk, PROTECT). 'current_week' is early/mid block (normal week, not a deload).

templates.name: Front Squat strength (paused)
movements: Paused Front Squat (3s pause in the hole) — attacks the clean stand-up (recovery-limited)

templates.name: Strict Press strength
movements: Strict Press — dedicated overhead-press volume (the genuine weak link; box under-supplies it)

templates.name: Ring MU skill
skill_items: Ring MU transitions (low rings / feet assist) — 5 x 3
